sections.title: After completing Below Ice Mountain in Nardah

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, the desert really suits you Marley.

lines.speaker: Marley
lines.text: [player name] my old pal! How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Better now I don't have to deal with you. Enjoying life in the desert?

lines.speaker: Marley
lines.text: Not really. I'm not suited to such harsh climates. No steak sandwiches here either...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh what a shame! Poor Marley's going to starve as he doesn't have anyone to make his sandwiches... So sad.
